paper.$description: Paper — Page canvas, base surface behind text — off-white, never pure white, to soften photographic edges

ink.$description: Ink — Primary text, hairline borders, link underlines — the only chromatic accent in the system is its absence of color

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Dark content surface for text-only sections — warm-leaning black that softens contrast against pure ink

midnight-soil.$description: Midnight Soil — Deepest dark surface, used for the most recessed bands — barely distinguishable from charcoal but warmer

ash.$description: Ash — Hairline borders, disabled borders, subtle dividers — a neutral gray that whispers structure without drawing the eye

driftwood.$description: Driftwood — Warm taupe accent surface, used sparingly as a tonal break in dark sections — the only non-achromatic hint in the palette

favorit.$description: The single typeface for everything: hero titles at 41px weight 400, body at 17px weight 400, captions at 15px weight 300. Weight 300 is the signature choice for secondary text — it creates hierarchy through restraint rather than bold contrast. Slight negative tracking (-0.02em to -0.022em) tightens the grotesque's default rhythm. The same family voices headlines, navigation, buttons, and body, which is unusual — most systems differentiate roles through typefaces. Here, FAVORIT's dual weight and tight letterforms carry the entire hierarchy alone.

clarkson.$description: Reserved for micro-copy or supporting text in specific contexts — appears at low frequency and never headlines. Could be a FAVORIT alternate cut rather than a true second family.

halyard-display.$description: Rare accent — appears in button or micro-label contexts. Functions as a display-only voice when FAVORIT needs to step aside.

paper.$description: Surface level 1: Base canvas, the default page surface behind text-only blocks

driftwood.$description: Surface level 2: Warm tonal break surface — used as an accent band, not a default

ash.$description: Surface level 3: Divider lines, disabled borders, subtle structural gray

midnight-soil.$description: Surface level 4: Deepest dark band — used sparingly for the most recessed sections

charcoal.$description: Surface level 5: Dark content surface for intertitle-style text sections
